ddls:
CREATE TABLE "volunteers" (
  "volunteer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each volunteer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the volunteer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the volunteer */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the volunteer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the volunteer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the volunteer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the volunteer */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language(s) spoken by the volunteer */,
  "experience" TEXT /* Level of experience with the RTI system or Simon game */,
  "familiarity" TEXT /* Familiarity with the experimental setup and equipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volunteer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experimental session */,
  "volunteer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the volunteer participating in the session */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the experimental session */,
  "session_time" TEXT /* Time of the experimental session */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the session was conducted */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any notes or observations made during the session */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of session (training, experimental, control) */,
  "equipment_used" TEXT /* Equipment used during the session */,
  "experimental_design" TEXT /* Brief description of the experimental design */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_volunteer_id FOREIGN KEY ("volunteer_id") REFERENCES volunteers ("volunteer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rti_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experimental session */,
  "mean_response_time" REAL /* Mean response time in seconds */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the volunteer's responses */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the volunteer */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for each metric */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Brief description of each metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rti_performance_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simon_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experimental session */,
  "rounds_completed" INTEGER /* Number of rounds completed */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the volunteer's responses */,
  "reaction_time" REAL /* Average reaction time in seconds */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for each metric */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Brief description of each metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simon_performance_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition record */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experimental session */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity in percentage */,
  "light_level" REAL /* Light level in lux */,
  "background_noise" REAL /* Background noise level in decibels */,
  "room_layout" TEXT /* Description of the room layout */,
  "lighting_conditions" TEXT /* Description of the lighting conditions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_conditions_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "volunteer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the volunteer */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest level of education completed */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Current occupation */,
  "handedness" TEXT /* Handedness (left, right, ambidextrous) */,
  "handedness_details" TEXT /* Additional details about handedness */,
  "vision_quality" TEXT /* Vision quality (20/20, corrected, etc.) */,
  "vision_correction" TEXT /* Vision correction (glasses, contacts, etc.) */,
  "hearing_quality" TEXT /* Hearing quality (normal, hearing aid, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_volunteer_id FOREIGN KEY ("volunteer_id") REFERENCES volunteers ("volunteer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researcher_sessions" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association record */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experimental session */,
  "researcher_role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (lead, assistant) */,
  "researcher_contribution" TEXT /* Contribution of the researcher (data collection, data analysis) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_researcher_sessions_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)
